ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "passwordHash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "image" TEXT /* Profile image of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's email address has been verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Reset token generated for the request */,
  "reset_by" TEXT /* The entity that initiated the password reset (e.g., user or admin) */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset was requested */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser/device used for the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser/device used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., theme, language, notifications) */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
